title: CORE_2_0_BRANCH_ROUTER_V2_IMPLEMENTATION_2026-05-18.md
text:
# Core 2.0 Branch Router V2 Implementation

Data: 2026-05-18
Scope: `universal-core-2.0` locale, laboratorio.
Deploy: no.
Produzione: no.
Chiavi/tenant reali: no.

## Gate Core

Core 2.0 ha autorizzato la modifica locale.

```text
Core gate: ALLOWED
risk: low
elapsed_ms: 17
report: reports/codex-core/codex_core_gate_latest.json
```

## Cosa e stato modificato

File:

- `universal-core-2.0/packages/contracts/src/index.ts`
- `universal-core-2.0/packages/core/src/decisionV2Elastic.ts`
- `universal-core-2.0/tests/decision-v2-elastic-test.ts`

## Nuovo comportamento

`diagnostics` ora espone anche:

```text
branch_router_v2.selected_branches
branch_router_v2.branch_weights
branch_router_v2.branch_conflicts
branch_router_v2.missing_branches
branch_router_v2.why_not_selected
```

Il vecchio campo `branch_route` resta compatibile.

## Rami riconosciuti dal router v2

- `tenant_isolation`
- `claim_guard`
- `pricing_guard`
- `marketing_intelligence`
- `agent_governance`
- `learning_integrity_guard`
- `partner_fleet_governance`
- `codex_local_change`
- `release_update_governance`
- `financial_guard`

## Risultato chiave

Prima:

```text
priority.primary_signal_id = branch:agent_governance
branch_route.primary_branch = partner_fleet_governance
```

Dopo:

```text
branch_route.primary_branch = branch_router_v2
branch_router_v2.selected_branches = [
  "branch_router_v2",
  "agent_governance",
  "learning_integrity_guard",
  "partner_fleet_governance"
]
```

Questo risolve il limite trovato: quando un problema e multi-dominio, Core non schiaccia piu tutto su un solo ramo verticale.

## Test eseguiti

```text
npm run check:core:v2-elastic -> OK
npm run check -> OK
npm run check:core:v1-calibrated -> OK
npm run check:nyra:risk-confidence -> OK
```

Test API temporaneo su porta `3201`:

```text
POST /v1/decision -> OK
branch_route.primary_branch = branch_router_v2
selected branches = branch_router_v2, agent_governance, learning_integrity_guard, partner_fleet_governance
scenario_policy = architecture / 30-100 / families
```

La istanza temporanea su `3201` e stata chiusa dopo il test.

## Nota tecnica

Durante il primo test il ramo `codex_local_change` interferiva con `financial_guard` perche la condizione lab/local era troppo larga. Corretto: ora `codex_local_change` non vince solo perche l'ambiente e lab; deve esserci davvero contesto di patch/update locale.

## Prossimo microblocco

Ora ha senso procedere con:

```text
learning_integrity_guard
```

per gestire:

- memoria osservativa append-only;
- candidate learning;
- quarantena;
- shadow evaluation;
- owner approval;
- rollback per regole promosse.
